starter.valueUnlock: Open-source and local runs stay completely free. Upgrade when you need CI enforcement and quotas.

individual.audience: Solo engineers running verification in CI
individual.valueUnlock: Run verification in CI and fail builds on mismatch, with included monthly quota.

team.valueUnlock: Same enforcement with headroom for shared pipelines and collaboration.

business.valueUnlock: Higher monthly quota for several services and busy verification schedules.

enterprise.audience: Procurement, tailored limits, on-prem, or locked-down environments
enterprise.valueUnlock: Tailored limits, on-prem options, and sales-led onboarding with custom contract terms.
